Class PortScannerService

java.lang.Object
util.portScanner.services.PortScannerService
public class PortScannerService extends Object
Service for scanning TCP ports on a target host.

This class performs multithreaded port scanning by attempting socket connections across a port range.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • PortScannerService

      public PortScannerService(String target, int startPort, int endPort)
      Creates a port scanner service instance.
      Parameters:
      target - target IP address or hostname
      startPort - starting port number
      endPort - ending port number

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public void execute()
      Starts the port scanning process.

      Ports are scanned concurrently using a thread pool. Each port is tested by attempting a TCP socket connection.

    • setEndPort

      public void setEndPort(int endPort)

    • setStartPort

      public void setStartPort(int startPort)

      public ArrayList<ScanResult> getScanResults()
      Returns the scan results.
      Returns:
